title: Mellow British Savoy Cabbage Bowl
description: A buttery and chewy Cornish dish featuring savoy cabbage, perfect for a low-calorie date night dinner, served in an earthenware bowl with a char-grill flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the olive oil.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the shredded savoy cabbage and cook for 5 minutes until it starts to soften.
Season the cabbage with salt, black pepper, and lemon juice, and stir to combine.
Transfer the cabbage mixture to an earthenware bowl and top with diced char-grilled chicken breast.
Cover the bowl with aluminum foil and bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 5 minutes until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
